enchantment.radenchants.appetite.desc: You cannot consume food items, but your exhaustion increases more slowly
enchantment.radenchants.bash.desc: Consecutive hits in a short period deal bonus damage
enchantment.radenchants.bolas.desc: Attach weighted bombs to the target, applying Slowness and Gravity, then explode shortly afterwards
enchantment.radenchants.breaching.desc: Has a chance to breach shields
enchantment.radenchants.climbing_gear.de: Climb ladders faster; at max level, instantly climb by right-clicking
enchantment.radenchants.defiance.desc: Fully restores health when you would otherwise die
enchantment.radenchants.discovery.desc: Increases the chances of getting good loot while brushing
enchantment.radenchants.dreams.desc: While sleeping, you may suffer negative effects or awaken a nightmare
enchantment.radenchants.dual_edge.desc: Slaying enemies increases damage dealt and received
enchantment.radenchants.ethereal.desc: Reduces durability by half, but increases Damage, Armor, and Armor Toughness by 50%%. Ethereal items cannot be used in an anvil
enchantment.radenchants.fateweaver.desc: Occasionally grants buffs while near full health
enchantment.radenchants.glare.desc: You stare daggers at enemies, harming those who lock eyes with you
enchantment.radenchants.gluttony.desc: Consume food faster, but with reduced nutritional value. No penalty at max level
enchantment.radenchants.gravity_well.des: Creates a surge of gravity upon impact, pulling nearby mobs toward the point of impact before dealing damage
enchantment.radenchants.hawk_eyes.desc: See farther when aiming, halved arrow damage, consecutive successful shots add magic damage
enchantment.radenchants.iron_will.desc: Grants knockback immunity and Resistance at low health
enchantment.radenchants.landmines.desc: Chance for lit TNT to spawn when you move
enchantment.radenchants.life_leech.desc: Heals the user for a portion of damage dealt
enchantment.radenchants.magical_blade.de: Converts a portion of damage to magic
enchantment.radenchants.magnetic_soles.d: Climb and hang from surfaces using magnetism. Gain knockback immunity while attached
enchantment.radenchants.meteor.desc: Ignites upon throwing, and if thrown high enough, halts midair before plummeting into a fiery explosion
enchantment.radenchants.moon_boots.desc: Jump higher and fall slower, Grants immunity to fall damage
enchantment.radenchants.night_mask.desc: Sleeping recovers health, also causes Blindness
enchantment.radenchants.one_man_army.des: Damage increases based on how many monsters are nearby
enchantment.radenchants.rabbits_feet.des: Jump higher and fall faster. Grants immunity to fall damage
enchantment.radenchants.redoubled_offens: Grants a chance to deal double damage
enchantment.radenchants.rejuvenate.desc: Increases all healing received from any source
enchantment.radenchants.ruthless.desc: Low health enemies take increased damage
enchantment.radenchants.safeguard.desc: Gains charges over time that completely blocks attacks
enchantment.radenchants.seventh.desc: Deals bonus damage whenever your hit counter lands on a number with sevens
enchantment.radenchants.shadow_bind.desc: On impact, ensnares nearby mobs in shadow, inflicting Slowness
enchantment.radenchants.shadow_glide.des: Grants Speed in low light areas
enchantment.radenchants.soul_mending.des: Repairs durability by using victim's souls
enchantment.radenchants.tiger_claws.desc: Hitting a full health target with a critical empowers you and deals bonus damage
enchantment.radenchants.welding_apron.de: Reduces the chance of Anvil damage when combining items
message.radenchants.insomnia: You can't seem to fall asleep
tooltip.radenchants.hawk_eyes: Hawk Eyes Streak: %s (%s of original arrow damage added as Magic)
